1: In that day there shall be a fountain opened to the house of David and to the inhabitants of Jerusalem for sin and for uncleanness.
2: And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the LORD LORD of hosts, that that I will cut off the names of the idols out of the land, and they shall no more be remembered: and also I will cause the prophets and the unclean spirit to pass out of the land.
3: And it shall come to pass, that that when any shall yet prophesy, then his father and his mother that begat him shall say unto him, Thou shalt not live; for thou speakest lies in the name of the LORD LORD : and his father and his mother that begat him shall thrust him through when he prophesieth.
4: And it shall come to pass in that day, that that the prophets shall be ashamed every one of his vision, when he hath prophesied; neither shall they wear a rough garment to deceive:
5: but he shall say, I am am no prophet, I am am an husbandman; for man taught me to keep cattle from my youth.
6: And one one shall say unto him, What are are these wounds in thine hands? Then he shall answer, Those Those with which I was wounded in in the house of my friends.
7: Awake, O sword, against my shepherd, and against the man that is that is my fellow, saith the LORD LORD of hosts: smite the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered: and I will turn mine hand upon the little ones.
8: And it shall come to pass, that that in all the land, saith the LORD LORD , two parts therein shall be cut off and and die; but the third shall be left therein.
9: And I will bring the third part through the fire, and will refine them as silver is refined, and will try them as gold is tried: they shall call on my name, and I will hear them: I will say, It is is my people: and they shall say, The LORD LORD is is my God.
